response.global_analysis: The video features Koseki Bijou (Biboo) performing a monologue followed by the song 'Tetris' (Macne Nana) and a dialogue with Shirakami Fubuki. Audio phonetically matches the on-screen lyrics and the provided song context. Timing is strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, ensuring no bleed into subsequent lines. Translations preserve the playful and energetic tone of the performers.
